prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The guidance on climate scenario analysis is applicable to England as it is aimed at public sector organisations operating within the framework of TCFD recommendations, which are influential in England's legislative and regulatory environment regarding climate risk management.
